zh.St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympto: 英國戴文普林普頓聖 瑪麗 布萊德 維吉恩斯 邱奇
zh.Plimpton, St Mary's, Devon, ENGLAND: 英國英格蘭戴文武爾法爾迪斯沃希聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh.lifeSummary: John Snelling是William Snelling和Mrs- William Snelling的兒子，於1450年出生在英國戴文。他於1485年7月1日與Joan Coddington在英國素瑞布萊欽格利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1529年5月8日在英國戴文普林普頓聖 瑪麗 布萊德 維吉恩斯 邱奇享年79歲。

zh-hans.St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympto: 英国戴文普林普頓聖 瑪麗 布萊德 維吉恩斯 邱奇
zh-hans.Plimpton, St Mary's, Devon, ENGLAND: 英国英格兰戴文武爾法爾迪斯沃希聖 馬也斯 邱奇
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Snelling是William Snelling和Mrs- William Snelling的儿子，于1450年出生在英国戴文。他于1485年7月1日与Joan Coddington在英国素瑞布萊欽格利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1529年5月8日在英国戴文普林普頓聖 瑪麗 布萊德 維吉恩斯 邱奇享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Snelling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Snelling (Old English Snelling), a derivative of Snell .

habitational name from Snelland (Lincolnshire), from the Old English personal name Snell (genitive Snelles) or the Old Norse personal name Snjallr (genitive Snjalls) + Old Norse lúndr ‘small wood, grove’. See Snell .

variants.name: Snell
meanings: English: nickname for a quick, lively, or courageous person, from Middle English snel(l) ‘swift, vivacious, brisk, bold’ (Old English snel(l), Old Norse snjallr). See also Sneller , Snelling .
English: from the Middle English personal name Snel(l) (Old English Snell, Old Norse Snjallr, with the same origins as the nickname above).

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: John Snelling was born in 1450, in Devon, England as the son of William Snelling and Mrs- William Snelling. He married Joan Coddington on 1 July 1485, in Bletchingley, Surrey, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 May 1529, in St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympton, Devon, England, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: John Snelling est né en 1450, à Devon, Angleterre, fils de William Snelling et Mrs- William Snelling. Il a épousé Joan Coddington le 1 juillet 1485, à Bletchingley, Surrey, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 mai 1529, à St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympton, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans.

it.lifeSummary: John Snelling è nato il nel 1450 nel Devon, England come figlio di William Snelling e Mrs- William Snelling. Lui sposato Joan Coddington il 1 luglio 1485, nel Bletchingley, Surrey, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 maggio 1529, nel St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympton, Devon, England, all'età di 79 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Snellingは1450年にイギリスデボンでWilliam SnellingとMrs- William Snellingの息子として生まれた。1485年7月1日にイギリススリーブレトチングリーでJoan Coddingtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1529年5月8日にイギリスデボンプリンプトンスト マリー ブレセド バージン'ス チャーチで79歳で死去した。

ko.St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympto: 영국 데폰 플림프턴 스트 메리 블레시드 버긴'스 c후르치
ko.Plimpton, St Mary's, Devon, ENGLAND: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 보파르디스워시 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: John Snelling(은)는 1450년 영국 데폰에서 William Snelling(와)과 Mrs- William Snelling의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1485년 7월 1일 영국 수리 블레트친글리에서 Joan Coddington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1529년 5월 8일 영국 데폰 플림프턴 스트 메리 블레시드 버긴'스 c후르치에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Snelling nasceu em 1450, em Devon, Inglaterra filho de William Snelling e Mrs- William Snelling. Ele casou-se com Joan Coddington em 1 de julho de 1485, em Bletchingley, Surrey, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de maio de 1529, em St Mary Blessed Virgin's Church, Plympton, Devon, Inglaterra, com 79 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: John Snelling родился в 1450 г. в местности девон, Англия. Его родителей звали William Snelling и Mrs- William Snelling. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Coddington 1 июля 1485 г. в местности блечингли, сурри, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 мая 1529 г. в местности ст мэри блессед виргин'с чурч, плимптон, девон, Англия в возрасте 79 лет.
